headlines.title: Vance ‘feeling good’ after a week selling his book — and a deal to end the Iran war
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance had this week circled on his calendar for months

headlines.title: Trump endorses a second candidate in the South Carolina governor’s race
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is now throwing his support behind both of the remaining Republicans in the South Carolina governor’s race as he seeks to avoid the possibility of another primary setback this month

headlines.title: Trump unveils new Air Force One jet gifted by Qatar
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Friday officially unveiled his new Air Force One jet that was contentiously given to him by the Qatari government, declaring it would be used during a ceremonial flyover in Washington on July 4 to mark the 250th anniversary of the United States

headlines.title: Top Italian diplomat cancels U.S. trip after prime minister slams Trump's claim about G7 photo
headlines.description: Italy's top diplomat canceled a trip to the U.S. after Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni slammed President Trump's claims that she "begged" him for a photo at the G7 summit. The dispute erupted after Trump told Italian broadcaster La7 that Meloni had pleaded with him for a photo at the meeting of leading industrialized nations in the French resort of Evian-les-Bains earlier this week.

headlines.title: Israeli and Palestinian activists turn personal grief into message of peace
headlines.description: Maoz Inon, an Israeli activist, and Aziz Abu Sarah, a Palestinian activist, join Meet the Press NOW for an NBC News Common Ground conversation. The two peace activists discuss their mission for reconciliation amid the ongoing conflict.

headlines.title: Trump unveils brand new Air Force One jet gifted by Qatar
headlines.description: President Donald Trump officially unveiled a new Air Force One jet, gifted by the Qatari government. Trump announced it will be used in a ceremonial flyover in Washington on July 4 to commemorate the 250th anniversary of the United States.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Blue paint seen chipping off Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool after algae turn it green
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s makeover of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool ahead of America’s 250th anniversary celebrations is not going according to plan.

headlines.title: Obama says U.S. may be ‘worse off’ now than before Iran war
headlines.description: Former President Barack Obama said it seems like the United States has either returned to the status quo or is “worse off” now than before President Donald Trump launched the war on Iran in February.“We’ve now fought a war, spent billions and billions of dollars, you know, put enormous strain on our military.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Maryland Senate president faces primary after snubbing Democratic redistricting effort
headlines.description: Maryland state Senate president Bill Ferguson is facing a primary challenge in the wake of his decision last year not to pursue a new Democratic gerrymander in the state, in a rebuke to national Democrats and the governor.
